phases.label: TF Basics
phases.description: Tensors, Keras API, and model training.

topics.label: Tensors & Operations
topics.description: tf.constant, tf.Variable, shape, dtype. Tensors are TF's core data type.

topics.label: Keras Sequential API
topics.description: Sequential model with Dense, Conv2D, LSTM layers. model.compile, fit, evaluate.

topics.label: Data Loading
topics.description: tf.data.Dataset for efficient data pipelines. batch, shuffle, prefetch.

topics.label: Training & Callbacks
topics.description: EarlyStopping, ModelCheckpoint, TensorBoard. Monitor and control training.

topics.label: CNNs
topics.description: Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, Flatten for image classification.

topics.label: Transfer Learning
topics.description: Use pre-trained models (ResNet, EfficientNet) and fine-tune.

topics.label: Saving & Serving
topics.description: model.save, SavedModel format, TensorFlow Serving for production.
